wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Igogomi Shopify theme project overview. Explain its purpose as a modern e-commerce theme focused on advanced product presentation, responsive design, and enhanced user interaction. wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# Igogomi Shopify Theme - Comprehensive Project Overview

## Project Introduction

### Purpose Statement
Igogomi is a modern Shopify theme built with the Essence theme framework, designed specifically for e-commerce websites requiring advanced product presentation capabilities and enhanced user experience. The project integrates sophisticated frontend technologies with Shopify's Liquid templating system to create a responsive, accessible, and performant online shopping experience.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Enhanced Product Experience**: Provide immersive product viewing with advanced media handling including videos, 3D models, and interactive galleries
- **Modern UI/UX Design**: Implement contemporary design patterns with customizable typography, colors, and layout options
- **Performance Optimization**: Deliver fast-loading pages with lazy loading, optimized asset delivery, and efficient JavaScript
- **Accessibility Compliance**: Ensure WCAG 2.1 compliance with proper semantic markup and keyboard navigation
- **Multi-language Support**: Support international markets with localization features and currency switching

### Target Audience
- E-commerce businesses selling products that benefit from rich media presentation
- Brands requiring advanced customization options for visual identity
- Online stores targeting international markets with multi-language capabilities

## Technical Architecture

### Component Breakdown

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Theme Root] --> B[Layout Templates]
    A --> C[Section Components]
    A --> D[Snippet Partials]
    A --> E[Asset Files]
    
    B --> B1[theme.liquid - Main Layout]
    B --> B2[Product Template]
    B --> B3[Collection Template]
    B --> B4[Page Templates]
    
    C --> C1[Header Section]
    C --> C2[Product Sections]
    C --> C3[Footer Section]
    C --> C4[Custom Sections]
    
    D --> D1[Product Cards]
    D --> D2[Navigation Elements]
    D --> D3[Form Components]
    D --> D4[Media Handling]
    
    E --> E1[JavaScript Modules]
    E --> E2[CSS Stylesheets]
    E --> E3[Asset Bundles]
```

### Design Patterns
The project follows several key architectural patterns:

**Component-Based Architecture**: Each UI element is modularized into reusable components (sections, snippets, partials) that can be independently configured and styled.

**Configuration-Driven Development**: Extensive use of Shopify's settings schema allows non-technical users to customize themes without code changes.

**Progressive Enhancement**: Core functionality works without JavaScript, with enhanced interactions added progressively for better user experience.

### System Relationships

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Shopify Storefront] --> B[Theme Engine]
    B --> C[Liquid Templates]
    B --> D[JavaScript Runtime]
    B --> E[Asset Pipeline]
    
    C --> F[Layout Rendering]
    C --> G[Section Processing]
    C --> H[Snippet Inclusion]
    
    D --> I[Component Management]
    D --> J[Event Handling]
    D --> K[State Management]
    
    E --> L[CSS Generation]
    E --> M[JS Bundling]
    E --> N[Asset Optimization]
```

## Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points
- **Layout Template**: `layout/theme.liquid` - Primary HTML structure with dynamic asset loading
- **Settings Schema**: `config/settings_schema.json` - Central configuration hub for theme customization
- **Product Section**: `sections/beae-igogomi.liquid` - Advanced product presentation with media gallery

### Core Modules
- **JavaScript Framework**: `assets/main.mjs` - Modern ES module with custom web components
- **Header Component**: `sections/header.liquid` - Responsive navigation with dropdown menus
- **Product Card System**: `snippets/product-card.liquid` - Flexible product display with variant handling

### Configuration Approach
The theme uses Shopify's native settings system with comprehensive schema definitions allowing:
- Color customization through CSS variables
- Typography control via Google Fonts integration
- Layout adjustments for different screen sizes
- Performance optimizations (lazy loading, image optimization)

### External Dependencies
- **Photoswipe**: Lightbox functionality for product images
- **Model Viewer**: 3D model rendering support
- **Focus Trap**: Accessibility-focused modal management
- **Intersection Observer**: Performance-optimized scroll animations

### Integration Points
- **Shopify API**: Direct integration with Shopify's product, cart, and checkout systems
- **Localization**: Multi-language support with automatic currency conversion
- **Analytics**: Built-in support for various analytics platforms
- **Social Media**: Integrated sharing and social proof elements

### Component Relationship Diagram

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[Header Section] --> B[Navigation Dropdowns]
    A --> C[Cart Integration]
    A --> D[Search Modal]
    
    E[Product Section] --> F[Media Gallery]
    E --> G[Variant Picker]
    E --> H[Add to Cart Form]
    
    F --> I[Photoswipe Lightbox]
    F --> J[Video Player]
    F --> K[3D Model Viewer]
    
    G --> L[Quick Add Button]
    G --> M[Size Guide]
    
    N[Footer Section] --> O[Newsletter Signup]
    N --> P[Social Links]
    N --> Q[Legal Links]
```

## Key Features

### Functionality Overview
The theme provides comprehensive e-commerce functionality including:

**Advanced Product Presentation**
- Multi-format media support (images, videos, 3D models)
- Interactive media galleries with zoom capabilities
- Variant-based product information display
- Size guides and availability indicators

**Enhanced User Experience**
- Smooth animations and transitions
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Accessibility-compliant interface
- Performance-optimized asset loading

**Shopping Flow Integration**
- Seamless cart operations
- Checkout button integration
- Inventory status display
- Local pickup availability

### Implementation Highlights
- **Media Carousel**: `assets/main.mjs` - Custom carousel component with adaptive height and media synchronization
- **Product Card System**: `snippets/product-card.liquid` - Modular product display with conditional badges and quick add functionality
- **Header Navigation**: `sections/header.liquid` - Multi-level navigation with mega menu support and sticky header functionality
- **Localization**: `snippets/localization-form.liquid` - Country and language selector with real-time currency conversion

### Feature Architecture

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> ProductPage
    ProductPage --> MediaGallery: Load Product
    MediaGallery --> ZoomMode: Click Image
    MediaGallery --> VideoPlayer: Select Video
    MediaGallery --> ModelViewer: Select 3D Model
    
    ZoomMode --> MediaGallery: Exit Zoom
    VideoPlayer --> MediaGallery: Video Complete
    ModelViewer --> MediaGallery: Model Interaction
    
    ProductPage --> VariantPicker: Select Options
    VariantPicker --> QuickAdd: Available Options
    VariantPicker --> OutOfStock: Unavailable Options
    
    QuickAdd --> CartModal: Add to Cart
    CartModal --> ProductPage: Close Modal
    
    ProductPage --> SearchModal: Open Search
    SearchModal --> ProductPage: Close Search
    
    ProductPage --> NewsletterPopup: First Visit
    NewsletterPopup --> ProductPage: Dismiss/Subscribe
```

The Igogomi theme represents a sophisticated blend of modern web development practices and Shopify's e-commerce platform, delivering both technical excellence and business functionality for contemporary online retail experiences.

**Sources:**
- [settings_schema.json](config/settings_schema.json)
- [theme.liquid](layout/theme.liquid)
- [main.mjs](assets/main.mjs)
- [header.liquid](sections/header.liquid)
- [beae-igogomi.liquid](sections/beae-igogomi.liquid)
- [product-card.liquid](snippets/product-card.liquid)

</blog>
